notes: Chaos Cubed update. June 16, 2026. Major content update.

commands.name: ban
commands.description: Adds a player to the server banlist, preventing them from joining.

commands.name: ban-ip
commands.description: Adds an IP address to the server banlist.

commands.name: banlist
commands.description: Displays the server banlist.

commands.name: deop
commands.description: Removes operator status from a player.

commands.name: kick
commands.description: Kicks a player from the server with an optional reason.

commands.name: op
commands.description: Grants operator status to a player, allowing use of all commands.

commands.name: pardon
commands.description: Removes a player from the server banlist.

commands.name: pardon-ip
commands.description: Removes an IP address from the server banlist.

commands.name: say
commands.description: Sends a message to all players in chat via the server.

commands.name: tell
commands.description: Sends a private message to a specific player.

commands.name: whitelist
commands.description: Manages the server whitelist for joining players.

params.action: add, remove, list, on, or off

commands.name: give
commands.description: Gives an item to a player. The most commonly used command for spawning items.

commands.name: kill
commands.description: Kills entities. In Alpha/Beta it killed the executor with 1000 damage. From 1.13+ can target any entity.

commands.name: gamemode
commands.description: Sets a player's game mode (survival, creative, adventure, or spectator).

commands.name: difficulty
commands.description: Sets or queries the game difficulty level.

commands.name: defaultgamemode
commands.description: Sets the default game mode for new players joining the server.

commands.name: save-all
commands.description: Saves the server world to disk immediately.

commands.name: save-off
commands.description: Disables automatic world saving on the server.

commands.name: save-on
commands.description: Re-enables automatic world saving on the server.

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stops the server and saves all data.

commands.name: tp
commands.description: Teleports players to coordinates or to other entities. Alias: /teleport (1.8+)

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clears items from a player's inventory with optional filtering.

commands.name: gamerule
commands.description: Sets or queries game rules that control world behavior.

gamerules.description: Whether fire spreads and naturally extinguishes
Whether blocks drop items when broken
Whether players keep inventory after death
Whether mobs can change blocks (trample crops, break doors)
Whether command blocks broadcast output to chat
Whether death messages appear in chat (1.0+)
Random block ticks per chunk per tick (1.0+)
Whether F3 debug screen is reduced (1.0+)
Max entities in one block before damage (1.11+)
Whether players can only craft unlocked recipes (1.12+)
Whether advancements are announced in chat (1.12+)
Whether angry neutral mobs forgive dead players (1.16+)
Whether angered neutral mobs attack any player (1.16+)
Percentage of players to sleep to skip night (1.15+)
Whether block explosions drop loot with decay (1.20+)
Whether mob explosion drops have decay (1.20+)
Whether TNT explosion drops have decay (1.20+)
Max snow layer height from snowfall (1.20+)
Max blocks modified by a single command (1.19.4+)
Whether ender pearls vanish on thrower death (1.20+)

commands.name: seed
commands.description: Displays the world seed number.

commands.name: spawnpoint
commands.description: Sets the spawn point for a player at specified coordinates.

commands.name: time
commands.description: Changes or queries the world game time.

commands.name: toggledownfall
commands.description: Toggles the weather between clear and rainy/snowy. Replaced by /weather in Beta 1.8.

commands.name: xp
commands.description: Adds, sets, or queries player experience. From 1.8+ can use /experience.

params.amount: Points, or L prefix for levels

commands.name: weather
commands.description: Sets the weather with optional duration.

commands.name: enchant
commands.description: Enchants the item a player is holding.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Provides command help and lists available commands.

commands.name: me
commands.description: Displays an action message in chat in third person.

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Opens a singleplayer world to the local network (LAN).

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Starts or stops debugging and profiling.

commands.name: setidletimeout
commands.description: Sets the idle timeout before players are kicked from the server.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all players currently connected to the server.

commands.name: effect
commands.description: Adds or removes status effects on entities.

commands.name: scoreboard
commands.description: Manages scoreboard objectives and player scores. The core system for tracking data.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Sets a trigger objective that non-operator players can activate.

commands.name: tellraw
commands.description: Sends a JSON-formatted rich text message to players.

commands.name: playsound
commands.description: Plays a sound effect to players.

commands.name: spreadplayers
commands.description: Teleports entities randomly across a specified area.

commands.name: setblock
commands.description: Changes a single block at specified coordinates to another block type.

commands.name: fill
commands.description: Fills a region with a specific block type.

commands.name: summon
commands.description: Summons an entity at specified coordinates.

commands.name: setworldspawn
commands.description: Sets the world spawn point for all players.

commands.name: clone
commands.description: Copies blocks from one region to another.

commands.name: stopsound
commands.description: Stops playing sounds for players.

commands.name: particle
commands.description: Creates particle effects at a location.

commands.name: title
commands.description: Displays a title, subtitle, or actionbar text on players screens.

params.value: JSON text or time: fadeIn stay fadeOut

commands.name: team
commands.description: Manages entity teams and their properties like color, friendly fire, etc.

commands.name: teammsg
commands.description: Sends a message to all members of the sender team.

commands.name: worldborder
commands.description: Manages the world border size, center, and damage.

params.value: Damage per second or safe zone

commands.name: bossbar
commands.description: Creates and modifies custom bossbars that display above the hotbar.

commands.name: locate
commands.description: Finds the nearest structure, biome, or point of interest.

commands.name: advancement
commands.description: Grants, removes, or checks player advancements.

commands.name: recipe
commands.description: Gives or takes recipes from players.

commands.name: tag
commands.description: Controls entity tags for identification and selection.

commands.name: function
commands.description: Runs a function from a data pack.

commands.name: reload
commands.description: Reloads all data pack resources including functions, loot tables, and advancements.

commands.name: data
commands.description: Gets, merges, modifies, and removes block entity and entity NBT data.

commands.name: datapack
commands.description: Controls which data packs are loaded and their order.

commands.name: execute
commands.description: Executes a command with modified context. The most powerful and complex command in Minecraft.
examples: /execute if entity @p run say Player exists
/execute store result score @p kills run kill @e[type=Zombie]

commands.name: forceload
commands.description: Forces chunks to remain loaded constantly.

commands.name: loot
commands.description: Spawns loot from a loot table into inventory or the world.

commands.name: schedule
commands.description: Schedules a function to run after a specified delay.

commands.name: spectate
commands.description: Makes a player spectate an entity from its perspective.

commands.name: attribute
commands.description: Queries, adds, removes, or sets entity attributes.

commands.name: jfr
commands.description: Starts or stops JFR profiling for performance analysis.

commands.name: item
commands.description: Modifies or copies items in block or entity inventories.
examples: /item replace entity @p weapon.mainhand with block ~ ~ ~ container.0

commands.name: place
commands.description: Places a feature, jigsaw, template, or structure at a location.

commands.name: perf
commands.description: Captures performance metrics for 10 seconds.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Sends server version information including protocol and data versions.

commands.name: damage
commands.description: Applies damage to specified entities with optional damage type and source.

commands.name: fillbiome
commands.description: Fills a region with a specific biome.

commands.name: ride
commands.description: Makes an entity ride or dismount another entity.

commands.name: rotate
commands.description: Rotates an entity to face a direction or location.

commands.name: return
commands.description: Controls execution flow inside functions and changes return value.

commands.name: random
commands.description: Generates random values and rolls random numbers.

commands.name: tick
commands.description: Controls the game tick rate, freezing, and stepping.

commands.name: transfer
commands.description: Transfers a player to another server.

commands.name: dialog
commands.description: Shows or hides dialog/UI screens for players.
